title: Quran, Sura 56: Al-Waqi'a
description: Sura 56 (Al-Waqi'a: The Inevitable) from the Holy Quran.
introduction: Sura 56 (Al-Waqi'a: The Inevitable) from the Holy Quran.

translation.text: When the Occurrence occurs, there is no denying its occurrence. It will bring down some and raise up others.
